prompt:

## Instructions
Fill the single `sorry` in the private theorem `exists_moment_le_dual_hahn_banach_gap` in /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteDimL1LinfDuality/StrongDuality.lean. Do NOT edit any other file and do NOT change the statement. Build with `lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteDimL1LinfDuality.StrongDuality` (also builds Duality.lean) to zero errors / zero sorries in this file.

You may use ALL lemmas/defs from HahnBanachSetup.lean (imported): `coeffPoly`, `Ev`, `Ev_apply`, `Ev_injective hp hβ`, `Ev_single`, `contrastL`, `contrastL_apply`, `contrastL_single`, `ninf`, `le_ninf`, `ninf_nonneg`, `ninf_smul`, `ninf_add_le`, `ninf_sign`, `dual_nonneg hp hβ`, `contrastL_le_dual_mul_ninf hp hβ`. Their statements are FIXED; treat them as given even if their proofs still contain sorry.

Recipe (see the module docstring for the same 5 steps):
1. Let E := Fin (k+1) → ℝ, M := sSup (dualValSet p β), N : E → ℝ := fun x => M * ninf x. Have hM : 0 ≤ M := dual_nonneg hp hβ.
2. Build the LinearPMap `f : E →ₗ.[ℝ] ℝ` with domain `LinearMap.range (Ev p β)` and action `contrastL β b` on `Ev p β b`. Construct φ : (LinearMap.range (Ev p β)) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ as `contrastL β ∘ₗ (LinearEquiv.ofInjective (Ev p β) (Ev_injective hp hβ)).symm.toLinearMap`; then `f := ⟨LinearMap.range (Ev p β), φ⟩`. Key fact: for any b, `φ ⟨Ev p β b, LinearMap.mem_range_self _ b⟩ = contrastL β b` (via `LinearEquiv.ofInjective_symm_apply` / `symm_apply_apply`).
3. N_hom: `∀ c, 0<c → ∀ x, N (c•x) = c * N x` — `ninf_smul`, `abs_of_pos`, ring. N_add: `∀ x y, N (x+y) ≤ N x + N y` — `ninf_add_le` and `mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left`, `mul_add`, hM. hf: `∀ x : f.domain, f x ≤ N x` — obtain b with `Ev p β b = x` from `x.2 : x.1 ∈ range`, rewrite f via the step-2 fact to `contrastL β b`, and apply `contrastL_le_dual_mul_ninf hp hβ b` (note ninf (Ev p β b) = ninf x.1).
4. Apply `exists_extension_of_le_sublinear f N N_hom N_add hf` to get `⟨g, hg_ext, hg_le⟩` with g : E →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ, `hg_ext : ∀ x : f.domain, g x = f x`, `hg_le : ∀ x, g x ≤ N x`.
5. Set `w j := g (Pi.single j 1)`. Prove the linear-expansion `g x = ∑ j, x j * w j` for all x: write `x = ∑ j, x j • Pi.single j 1` (use `Finset.univ_sum_single`/`Pi.single`; `x j • Pi.single j 1 = Pi.single j (x j)` and `∑ j, Pi.single j (x j) = x`), then `map_sum`+`map_smul` and `smul_eq_mul`.
6. Provide `w` as the witness. Moment: for ℓ ≤ β, set `ℓ' : Fin (β+1) := ⟨ℓ, Nat.lt_succ_of_le hℓ⟩`. Then `g (Ev p β (Pi.single ℓ' 1))` equals both (a) `contrastL β (Pi.single ℓ' 1) = if ℓ=0 then 0 else 1` (via hg_ext on the range element + step-2 fact + `contrastL_single`, noting `(ℓ':ℕ)=ℓ`), and (b) `∑ j, (Ev p β (Pi.single ℓ' 1) j) * w j = ∑ j, p j^ℓ * w j = ∑ j, w j * p j^ℓ` (step-5 expansion + `Ev_single` + `mul_comm`). Conclude the moment equality.
7. Norm bound: let `σ : E := fun j => if 0 ≤ w j then (1:ℝ) else -1`. Show `∀ j, |σ j| = 1` (case split; `abs_one`, `abs_neg`), so `ninf σ = 1` (ninf_sign) and `N σ = M`. Show `∑ j, |w j| = ∑ j, σ j * w j` (each term: if 0≤w j then σ=1, |w j|=w j; else σ=-1, |w j|=-w j — `abs_of_nonneg`/`abs_of_neg`). Then `∑ j, σ j * w j = g σ` (step-5 expansion, mul_comm) `≤ N σ = M` (hg_le). Hence `∑ j, |w j| ≤ M`.
Refer to Basic.lean `momentSol_nonempty` for the `Fin (β+1)`↔`Fin (k+1)` index style if needed.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
